title: Pimpinella hallaisanensis
taxonomy: Pimpinella hallaisanensis is classified within the family Apiaceae. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and shared genetic features with other plants in the same family. Pimpinella hallaisanensis is further categorized as a member of the genus Pimpinella, which consists of various species of plants commonly known as anise or chervil. The genus Pimpinella is itself part of the larger order Apiales. The precise classification of Pimpinella hallaisanensis may be subject to revision as new research and data become available.
